svg.title: Multi-agent patient monitoring architecture
svg.desc: Diagram showing individual patient agents feeding into a floor aggregator agent, which powers the nurse station dashboard and doctor alert system.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What does each patient agent do? What data does it read and what analysis does it run?')
sendPrompt('What does each patient agent do? What data does it read and what analysis does it run?')
sendPrompt('What does each patient agent do? What data does it read and what analysis does it run?')
sendPrompt('What does each patient agent do? What data does it read and what analysis does it run?')
sendPrompt('What does the floor aggregator agent do exactly? How does it communicate with patient agents?')
sendPrompt('Design the nurse station dashboard UI. What information should be shown and how?')
sendPrompt('How does the doctor alert system work? When are doctors notified and how?')

svg.text: Flag types raised by patient agents:
· trend anomaly · medication reminder · vitals out of range · AI-suggested action
